chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: 4237 - وَ رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ تَأْكُلْ فِي آنِيَةِ ذَهَبٍ وَ لاَ فِضَّةٍ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4237 - Aban narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said: "Do not eat from vessels made of gold or silver."
